thesis: Self-improving agents need a loop: run in a reproducible environment, route models by policy, capture evidence, evaluate candidates, and deploy only better variants.

products.name: Sandbox
products.does: Creates reproducible workspaces for coding agents, tests, browser tasks, files, terminals, and snapshots.

products.name: Router
products.does: Routes OpenAI-compatible calls across providers with fallback, policy, health, usage attribution, and one API key.

products.name: Browser Agent
products.does: Runs real Chromium from a goal and captures screenshot, DOM, and step evidence.

products.name: Agent Eval
products.does: Scores traces, compares candidates, and prevents regressions in agent behavior.

products.name: Blueprint Agent
products.does: Builds, tests, evaluates, and packages agent services from one workbench.

products.name: Blueprints and x402
products.does: Attaches usage pricing, service discovery, operator deployment, and payment settlement to agent-callable services.
